# PHIL.038 ? Pure Land Buddhism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** pure_land_buddhism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Faith in Amitabha Buddha; rebirth in Pure Land; other-power over self-power; accessible path; devotional practice

## Application
Rely on grace and faith; value accessibility; devotional approach; trust in other-power; compassionate assistance

## Key Values
- Faith
- Grace
- Accessibility
- Devotion
